name: Plains
description: Flat grasslands with scattered trees and villages.

name: Forest
description: Overworld biome with many oak and birch trees.

name: Dark Forest
description: Dense forest with dark oak trees. Woodland mansions spawn here.

name: Birch Forest
description: Forest dominated by birch trees.

name: Flower Forest
description: Forest with many flowers and fewer trees.

name: Taiga
description: Cold forest with spruce trees, foxes, and wolves.

name: Snowy Taiga
description: Cold taiga covered in snow.

name: Old Growth Pine Taiga
description: Taiga with giant spruce trees and podzol.

name: Old Growth Spruce Taiga
description: Taiga with giant spruce trees.

name: Jungle
description: Dense tropical biome with tall trees, vines, and temples.

name: Bamboo Jungle
description: Jungle variant filled with bamboo and pandas.

name: Sparse Jungle
description: Sparse jungle variant.

name: Swamp
description: Wet biome with shallow water, oak trees, and witch huts.

name: Mangrove Swamp
description: Swamp with mangrove trees, mud, and frogs.

name: Desert
description: Dry biome with sand, cacti, and desert pyramids.

name: Savanna
description: Warm grassland with acacia trees and villages.

name: Windswept Hills
description: Hilly terrain with extreme height variation.

name: Windswept Gravelly Hills
description: Hills covered in gravel.

name: Windswept Forest
description: Forested hilly terrain.

name: Windswept Savanna
description: Savanna with extreme terrain and floating islands.

name: Badlands
description: Dry biome with terracotta and gold ore.

name: Wooded Badlands
description: Badlands with patches of oak trees.

name: Eroded Badlands
description: Badlands with eroded tall pillars.

name: Meadow
description: High-altitude grassy plain with flowers and rabbits.

name: Cherry Grove
description: Mountain biome with cherry trees and pink petals.

name: Grove
description: Snowy forest on mountain slopes.

name: Snowy Slopes
description: Cold mountain slopes with goats.

name: Jagged Peaks
description: High mountain peaks of stone and snow.

name: Frozen Peaks
description: High mountain peaks covered in ice.

name: Stony Peaks
description: High mountain peaks of stone and calcite.

name: Beach
description: Sandy area between oceans and land.

name: Snowy Beach
description: Cold beach covered in snow.

name: Stony Shore
description: Rocky shore without sand.

name: River
description: Long stretches of water through the Overworld.

name: Frozen River
description: River covered in ice.

name: Ocean
description: Large saltwater biome with fish, kelp, and shipwrecks.

name: Deep Ocean
description: Deeper ocean variant with ocean monuments.

name: Warm Ocean
description: Ocean with coral reefs and tropical fish.

name: Lukewarm Ocean
description: Ocean between warm and cold.

name: Cold Ocean
description: Cold ocean with cod.

name: Frozen Ocean
description: Ocean with icebergs and polar bears.

name: Deep Lukewarm Ocean
description: Deep variant of lukewarm ocean.

name: Deep Cold Ocean
description: Deep variant of cold ocean.

name: Deep Frozen Ocean
description: Deep variant of frozen ocean.

name: Mushroom Fields
description: Rare biome with mooshrooms. No hostile mobs.

name: Dripstone Caves
description: Underground biome with pointed dripstone.

name: Lush Caves
description: Underground biome with moss, azalea, and glow berries.

name: Deep Dark
description: Deep cave biome with sculk and the warden.

name: Nether Wastes
description: Main Nether biome with netherrack, lava, and ghasts.

name: Soul Sand Valley
description: Nether biome with soul sand and skeletons.

name: Crimson Forest
description: Nether forest with hoglins and piglins.

name: Warped Forest
description: Nether forest with endermen.

name: Basalt Deltas
description: Nether biome with basalt and magma cubes.

name: The End
description: Dimension of floating islands and the Ender Dragon.

name: End Highlands
description: Outer End islands with chorus plants and end cities.

name: End Midlands
description: Transition area between central End and outer islands.

name: End Barrens
description: Empty outer End areas.

name: Small End Islands
description: Small outer islands past the void.
